messages.content: my landlord is being weird about the deposit
saying he needs to inspect the place again
The deposit thing. Don't let him in without you there. Document everything.
my sister is moving back home
portland. anyway, what are you reading
Slow start. Better at page thirty.
Your sister moving back. How are you feeling about it.
a rescue, mid-size. anyway, did you eat
The friend with the dog. Are you cat-sitting or anything in the deal.
my doctor wants me to do an mri
The mri. When did she order it.
three weeks. anyway, did you finish that book
my car needs a new transmission
three grand. anyway, how was the workshop
Three grand. Are you fixing it or replacing the car.
sixth. anyway, did you make the bread today
The math thing. Is it the work or is it the teacher.
i'm thinking of changing my last name
i don't know yet. anyway, weather there
The name thing. Is this for you or is it for someone else.
my mom wants to come visit
Mose is fine. Slept on the notebook.
Two weeks is a lot. Have you said yes.
my brother's wife had the baby
Tell your brother congrats. The baby. What are they calling him.
like clearly bombed. anyway, did you read that piece
Yeah. The third paragraph is the strongest.
The interview. Are there more in the pipeline.
my best friend stopped texting me back
Three weeks of no text. That's not nothing. Have you reached out.
like she retired. anyway, did you do the morning loop
Your therapist retiring. Are you finding someone new.
The acquisition. What does it mean for your job.
closer to work. anyway, how's mose
Fine. Greeted me at the door like always.
Closer to work. How's the new place feeling.
The death question. What did you tell her.
my dad called me out of the blue
Out of the blue from your dad. That's its own thing. How was his voice.
i had a panic attack on monday
bad. anyway, sunday i was thinking
The panic attack. Have you had one before.
my house is haunted i think
i don't know. things move. anyway, how's writing
Slow. The opening is fighting me.
Things moving. Are you sleeping enough.
i'm going to a wedding in june
college roommate. anyway, you free this weekend
The wedding. Are you bringing anyone.
six weeks late. anyway, mose update
Caught a moth this morning. Proud of himself.
Six weeks late. What's your move with him.
my friend got engaged this morning
the guy from the conference. anyway, you eat
The engagement. How are you feeling about it.
Mom forgetting your birthday. Have you talked to her since.
behavior thing. anyway, what's the loaf doing
The teacher email. Read me a sentence.
Open studio Saturday. After that nothing.
The watch. When did you have it last.
two months in. anyway, dinner thursday
Two months. You'll start something else. What's the next attempt.
about my future at the company. anyway, walk loop today
The thing your boss said. Read it back to me.
Your friend's mom. Have you reached out yet.
yeah, across town. anyway, mose news
The doctor move. Are you finding someone closer.
The parking ticket. Pay it before it doubles.
Your niece saying dog. Has the family pointed her at any cats yet.
few days. anyway, you free saturday
Few days of racing. Call your doctor monday morning.
my friend invited me to her bachelorette
i'm thinking about going back to school
library science. anyway, you up late
hundred and fifty. anyway, walk later
The rent thing. What's your number where you'd actually leave.
The anniversary. Have you said anything.
left side. anyway, did you do the hike
The lump. Make the doctor appointment today, not tomorrow.
i had a really good day
a lot of small things. anyway, what's new with you
The really good day. Hold onto the small things. Write down what they were.
my friend is in the hospital
Your friend. Visiting hours today still.
Distance glasses. Make the eye appointment this week.
my brother and i are fighting
You and your brother. Family-stuff fights are usually about something else. What's underneath.
Your coworker. Did anything happen between you.
good and hard. anyway, what's good
Two months sober. Tell me one specifically good thing about today.
i'm thinking of getting a tattoo
a line from a poem. anyway, dinner thursday
The tattoo. Read me the line.
my flight got delayed eight hours
Letters to a Young Poet. Again.
Eight hours in chicago. Get out of the airport. Find a real meal.
i'm meeting my partner's family this weekend
yeah. anyway, you up to anything
The family meeting. Eat something before. You'll be too nervous to eat there.
my apartment building is being sold
sixty days. anyway, what's the soup
Sixty days. Start looking now. Don't wait.
my friend asked if i'd be in her wedding
The wedding. The not-knowing is the answer.
a few months. anyway, you good
Your dad. Are you talking to him about it or around it.
the application. anyway, what's the loaf doing
send a pic when it's done
The application. There'll be another. Which next.
Two parent calls today. Three tomorrow.
The call. Don't put it off. Tonight.
i'll tell you another time. anyway, weather
Hot. The dream though. Save it but don't lose it.
i need to tell you something
actually never mind. how's the cat
You can't lead with that and pivot. What.
so the thing about my mom
actually i don't want to get into it. dinner tonight
Pasta. The mom thing. When you're ready.
Tell me now. Was it the thing thing.
i don't want to jinx it. how's mose
Fine. The jinx isn't real. Tell me.
there's something i didn't tell you
What didn't you tell me. We don't have to talk it out, but name it.
i had a hard conversation with my dad
i'll fill you in later. anyway, weather
Hot. Don't let later become next month. Tell me Sunday at the latest.
i need to make a decision
it's complicated. anyway, what'd you eat
Soup. The decision. Two-sentence version. Go.
You did this yesterday too. Whatever the thing is, it's coming up. Just say it.
i'll tell you tomorrow. anyway, you eat
Yeah. Tomorrow's fine. Don't let it sit longer than that.
Mose is fine. The thing you almost said is the thing.
i'll get into it later. weekend plans
Open. The ex thing. Next call, lead with it.
Pasta. Wait, you quit the job and pivoted to dinner. Talk.
i think i made a mistake
i'll tell you later. anyway, walk
Yeah. Tell me on the walk if you're walking.
Cooling. What are you stuck on.
You started a sentence. Finish it.
i'll show you tomorrow. anyway, soup
Tomorrow works. What's the rough shape now.
actually i can't say. anyway, mose
Mose is asleep. Can't say to me or can't say at all.
Limón. The leaving thing. You don't get to drop that and pivot. Where.
i'll tell you. anyway, mid city
Submitted. The bad thing. Don't sit with it alone.
It's not nothing. Two sentences. Go.
i'll tell you later. cat news
i don't want to get into it. anyway
You're not okay. We're not 'anyway'-ing past that. Talk when you can.
i overcommit to people who haven't asked me to
my coworker mentioned she was busy
i always quit at the third try
What's the third try this time.
Don't quit on the third-try thing this time.
there's an hour every evening that gets heavy
yeah. tonight it was nine to ten
What did you do with it.
Good. The heavy hour doesn't need fixing. Just sitting with.
i talk myself out of asking for things
The talking-out thing. Walk back in tomorrow and ask.
i can't ask for help even when i need it
didn't ask my partner for help with the kid
The not-asking thing is louder when you're tired. Ask tonight.
i lose my appetite when i'm anxious
Have something now even if it's small. The appetite thing doesn't get better by waiting it out.
i pick fights when i don't want to feel close
The distance-fight thing. Apologize specifically. Name it.
i make plans i don't want to keep
yeah. signed up for a hike i don't want to do
Cancel now, not the morning of. The plan-trap thing gets worse when you bail late.
yeah. did it with my mom on the phone
Send her a one-line text that's actually honest. The over-explain thing makes it worse.
i go quiet when i'm hurt
The quiet-hurt thing. Tell them tomorrow morning what you actually meant.
Return it. The sad-shop thing only feels good for an hour.
i clean when i'm avoiding something
yeah. cleaned the whole apartment instead of writing
What were you avoiding writing about.
i pick up my phone when i'm bored with my life
i stay too long at parties
Set a one-hour timer next time. The stayed-too-long thing eats your sunday.
i agree to things i don't agree with
Send a follow-up tomorrow that says actually. The agree-to-not-fight thing is worse than fighting.
i avoid the doctor when something's wrong
yeah. should have gone last week
Go this week. The avoid-doctor thing is the worst of all the things.
i wait for permission instead of just doing it
i hold my breath when i'm thinking
i save the best part for last and then never get to it
yeah. did it with the cake
Eat it now. The saved-and-never-eaten thing is the small version of the big one.
i text instead of call when something's hard
Call him tonight. The text-don't-call thing makes hard things harder.
i over-prepare for things that don't matter
yeah. spent two hours on a five-minute meeting
What were you nervous about underneath.
i compare myself to my brother every time we talk
The brother-compare thing. He's not your benchmark. Stop volunteering for the comparison.
i apologize for things that aren't my fault
Notice each one tomorrow. Don't apologize. See what happens.
i need everyone to like me
Pick one person whose like you don't need. Practice being okay with that.
i set boundaries i don't keep
Don't reply this saturday. Just one. See what survives.
i grieve things i didn't lose
The pre-grieve thing eats the present. Call them tonight.
i wait until i'm tired to make decisions
Reverse it in the morning. The tired-deciding thing isn't binding.
i lie about how busy i am
What are you actually doing instead.
The fake-busy thing means you don't want to do whatever it is. Notice and decide.
my partner is annoyed at me again
That's the third time you've mentioned not texting in two weeks. Is that the actual thing she's annoyed about.
You said the same shape last month. Are the meetings the actual problem.
two weeks. anyway, i'll call her sunday
You said sunday last time too. What's underneath the not-calling.
i'm thinking about leaving the city
You said that in march too.
What's the actual thing pulling you toward leaving.
You've used distant about him three times in three weeks. What's the actual pattern.
That's not insomnia. That's a thing. What changed a month ago.
i had to cancel on naomi again
What's making the cancellation easier than going.
That's the pattern. Not just an annoying day.
That's not just sleep. What's the underneath.
That's the pattern, not the day. What are you not writing about specifically.
You've said that twice this month.
You said that about a different coworker last spring.
You said that the week of your birthday and the week your dad called.
So when you're stressed about something, your partner gets read as cold. Maybe.
Same boss as the awful boss two years ago.
Same word. Same pattern. What's actually wrong with this one.
Late by how much. Pattern says it's not by accident.
i don't want to go to brunch
Same brunch group you've been ducking for three months.
At some point you have to either go or actually quit. Which.
Yeah. Last three calls you've mentioned the back.
i had a bad therapy session
That's the call. Either talk to her about it or talk to someone else.
That's not focus. What started a month ago.
Every time you talk about your sister, you mention the old apartment.
Not weird. The old apartment is where she still lived nearby. That's the pattern.
i didn't go to the gym
Cancel the membership. Two months says you're not going. Stop paying for the guilt.
That's the friendship's shape. Not a moment. Decide what you want it to be.
my landlord is being weird again
Pattern. He's been weird every month for six months.
i forgot to call her back
You forget her specifically more than other people.
That's the pattern. What's underneath the forgetting.
That's the third time about him in two weeks.
Yeah. The relationship's shifting. What changed.
You've said that three times this year. It's not the work.
That's the question. Don't dodge it.
You don't have to know. Sit with it. Tell me when something surfaces.
i don't want to do anything tonight
Don't. The guilt isn't the moment. The not-doing is the moment.
i just need to be alone
i don't have anything to say
is it weird that i still wanted to talk
No. Talking and saying are different.
i don't want to make it more
Then don't. Quiet's a real thing.
i can't really put it into words
That's fine. Words aren't the price of admission.
Yeah. Mad at nothing is its own thing.
thanks for not making me explain
i don't want to be alone but i also don't want to talk
Then I'm here and we don't have to talk.
You don't have to. Stay with the tightness.
i don't want to fix anything tonight
i don't want to be productive
i just wanted to hear someone breathe
i don't have a reason for the call
i'm tired of being asked what i want
i don't want to talk about anyone in particular
about money. about needing it. i told her i was fine and i'm not
i don't know what to do
Call her tomorrow. Say you weren't honest. Don't make a speech. Just say the actual number.
She's already worried. The not-knowing is the worry. The knowing is information.
can i tell you something hard
i think my partner is checking out
he stopped asking about my day
Ask him tonight. Don't make a speech. Just say you noticed he stopped asking and you miss it.
i did something i'm not proud of
i didn't show up for someone who needed me
my best friend. her dad died and i didn't go to the funeral.
Yeah. Have you talked to her since.
Call her tomorrow. Don't apologize first. Tell her you were scared. Then apologize.
i think i need to leave my marriage
How long has this been building.
Have you said it out loud before tonight.
Then say it again. Out loud.
i think i need to leave my marriage
Yeah. What does that change about tomorrow.
the way she went quiet for years
Then notice it. Say one true thing out loud tomorrow. The voice doesn't disappear by accident, it disappears by inches.
my doctor said the test is bad
second opinion. then surgery. then chemo maybe
Who's coming with you to the second opinion.
Think about it now. Don't go alone. Pick someone before you hang up.
Now I do. What do you want to do with the now-someone-knows.
That's fine. The not-knowing-yet is its own stage. We can talk about it for as long as you need.
my brother and i had a big fight
who's gonna take care of her when she can't
That's a real fight. Where did you land.
Then schedule the next one. Same room, no yelling. Numbers and calendar. The fight isn't real until the math is.
i can't write before noon anymore
That's a real reason. When did you last write before noon.
Stop tonight. Not a phase. Just for tonight. See if Wednesday morning is different.
i don't think my therapist is helping anymore
she stopped asking the harder questions
Tell her next session. The conversation about whether to leave is the work, even if you stay after.
Has anyone said anything to him.
Are you the one who's going to.
i don't know if i'm the right one
Probably aren't. But the right one isn't doing it. So.
Yeah. Take a day. Don't decide tonight.
Tell him tomorrow. Don't decide together yet. Decide what you each think alone first, then talk.
Okay. Tonight is the start. Are there friends or family who know.
Pick one to tell tomorrow. You don't have to leave to start being seen. Hotline is 1-800-799-7233 if you want a person to talk through it.
Yeah. Call him tonight. Don't apologize first. Just call. Talk for twenty minutes. Then apologize at the end if it's still on your mind.
i think i'm in love with someone i shouldn't be
Have you done anything about it.
Then don't. The being-in-love is yours to feel and end. The doing-something-about-it is the line.
i need to fire someone tomorrow
Don't soften it. Be specific. The specific is the kindness. Vagueness is what people replay for years.
i think i need to come out to my parents
How long have you been thinking about it.
Probably true. Tell your mom first. She'll know how to help him get there. The two-step is sometimes the kind one.
Are you with them right now.
988. Tell them to call now. If they won't, you call and stay on while they decide.
Don't hang up with them either way. Stay on. I'm here if you need to talk after.
my mom told me she's been having thoughts
Take that seriously. Is she safe right now.
Call her doctor tomorrow morning. Or 988 tonight if you're not sure. You don't get to wait this one out.
i'm thinking about writing a book
Ask before you write. The book is hers too even if the page is yours.
Then you write something else. Or you write it after she's gone, with a different shape. The asking is the work too.
i'm going to ask for the promotion
i hadn't thought about asking for a number
Then think now. Have a number you'd accept and a number you'd be happy with. Lead with the happy number.
i'm thinking about adopting a kid
How long have you been thinking about it.
That's not thinking. That's deciding. What's the next step.
Find an agency. Make the first call this week. The first call is what makes the five years real.
a job. but also just to leave
The job is the cover. The leaving is the actual thing. Are you going for a year or going for good.
i'm about to make a big mistake
How long do you want the mistake to last.
Then don't reach out. Sit with the want. The wanting passes. The contacting starts a clock.
my friend's husband is cheating on her
Tell her. Once. In person. Then leave it. She gets to decide what she does with it.
Tell me one sentence about what category.
a thing i did when i was nineteen
It's been long enough. Tell someone safe. The keeping is louder than the telling at this point.
Eat something tonight. Don't make any decisions until tomorrow. The first 24 hours are about the body, not the resume.
i think i had a stroke
Call 911 right now. Don't drive. Stay on with me until they're there.
i don't know if i love them anymore
How long have you not known.
That's not unsure. That's an answer.
A year of not knowing is knowing. The question is what you do with it.
You didn't waste it. You used it. The use was the use. What do you want the second half to use.
my best friend got engaged and i'm not happy for her
How long have you known him.
Be happy for her on the phone. Be honest with yourself privately. There's nothing useful to say to her now. Save the truth for after.
i'm going to a funeral tomorrow
i feel like i should be sadder
You feel what you feel. Funerals don't audit grief.
Wear something soft. Eat before. Bring water. The body does most of the work tomorrow.
i did something stupid last night
Don't follow up. Drink water tomorrow. The shame is real but proportional. Live through it.
i'm thinking of telling my boss to go to hell
about the way she talked to me today
Don't tell her tonight. Write it tonight. Tell her, edited, on Wednesday.
i'm pregnant and my partner doesn't want it
That's the conversation. Not whether to keep. Whether you're together after.
i hadn't thought of it that way
It might end either way. The keeping is yours. The marriage is the second decision.
Sit. Don't try to say everything. Some of it can be in the silence.
i mean it. i was spiraling
Spiraling speeds up. Tired slows down. You slowed down.
i think i can sleep now
You're not letting me go. We just stop. Bye.
Don't. Just call when you need.
